title: Cadence Design Systems (CDNS)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on Cadence using actuals. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what CDNS is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-46tzgnbo>
Cadence forms an effective duopoly with Synopsys in the EDA market. The AI boom necessitates custom silicon and highly complex system-on-chips (SoCs). This complexity directly translates to sustained, high-margin, double-digit growth. 15% is aggressive but reflective of recent historical norms and their near-monopoly pricing power.
